COURT TRIAL HELD NOV-26-2007 IN DEPT. 613 WITS S/E. MATTER SUBMITTED. COURT FOUND IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF ERIC ROUSSEL AND AGAINST DEFENDANT RHIANA POWERS AND AWARDED $581.58 TO PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO CSR 7489, CLERK: DAVID V. SWANSON, DEPT. 613

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROUSSEL, ERIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POWERS, RHIANA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 903 ASHBURY STREET, #3, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117 $386.58 RENT, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $581.58, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RHIANA POWERS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. RHIANA POWERS HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
